title: planner: dynamic partition prune should be aware of the caller‘s on-missing action
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tt3 (id INT NOT NULL, listid INT, name VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default_name');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tt3 LEFT JOIN (SELECT listid FROM tt3 WHERE listid = 5) AS subquery ON tt3.listid = subquery.listid;
key_bug_features: dynamic partition prune not handling missing partitions correctly
